summary: Comprehensive testing of BirthdayBoxBuilder modal + BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer on /celebrate-soul page for Mojo (pet-mojo-7327ad56 with chicken+soy allergies). All 16 backend tests and all 12 frontend UI tests PASSED.

issues: UX/Misleading: Allergy banner says 'Filtered for Mojo: no soy, chicken' on ALL 5 tabs, but product list filtering (filteredProducts) ONLY applies to the Wellness tab (line 156-158 in BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer.jsx). In the Cakes tab, 'Chicken Birthday Cake — Breed Edition' is still shown despite the allergy banner claiming products are filtered. The banner text is misleading. Main agent should either: (a) filter all tabs by allergy, or (b) change banner copy to 'Mira's pick is allergy-safe' instead of 'Filtered for...'

action_items: Minor UX: BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer shows 'Filtered for Mojo: no soy, chicken' banner on all tabs but only the Wellness tab actually filters products. Fix either: filter products on all tabs, OR update banner copy to not imply all products are filtered.
critical_code_review_comments: BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer.jsx line 156-158: filteredProducts only applies allergen filter to 'wellness' tab - yet allergy banner on line 199-210 shows on ALL tabs saying 'Filtered for {pet}: no {allergies}'. This is misleading when Chicken Birthday Cake still appears in the Cakes tab for a chicken-allergic pet.
BirthdayBoxBuilder.jsx: handleNext (line 346) uses boxData?.hasAllergies check - correctly routes to Step 2 if allergies exist, working as expected.
birthday_box_routes.py: POST /build correctly returns allergy_confirmation_required error when allergyConfirmed=False and pet has allergies - verified via backend tests.
Birthday box order ID format is bbox-{8 hex chars} and is saved to MongoDB birthday_box_orders collection - working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Mojo pet data. Multiple bbox- orders created during build testing (expected behavior).
context_for_next_testing_agent: BirthdayBoxBuilder modal and BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer are fully working. All 11 requested test points verified. Minor UX issue: allergy filtering in browse drawer only applied to wellness tab but banner text implies all tabs are filtered. Backend birthday_box_routes.py test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_birthday_box_routes.py - 16 tests all passing.

birthday_box_card_salmon_cake.evidence: Card shows 'Salmon birthday cake, allergy-safe' chip for Mojo (chicken allergy → safe fallback = salmon)

build_box_reveal_animation_then_modal.evidence: Clicking 'Build Mojo's Box' triggers 1.5s reveal animation (slot chips appear), then opens BirthdayBoxBuilder modal

builder_step1_6_slots.evidence: Modal Step 1 shows all 6 slots: HERO (Salmon Birthday Cake - Safe), JOY (Playing Fetch Birthday Gift), STYLE (Birthday Bandana), MEMORY (Paw Print Birthday Card), HEALTH (Age-Appropriate Wellness Treat - Safe), SURPRISE (Breed Surprise Gift - Surprise badge)

builder_step2_allergy_confirmation.evidence: Step 2 shown because Mojo has chicken+soy allergies. Shows 'Health & Allergy Check', 'Mojo's Allergy Profile: soy, chicken', checkbox 'I confirm I've reviewed the box', Confirm & Build button (disabled until checked)

builder_step3_success.evidence: After checking checkbox and clicking Confirm & Build, Step 3 shows 'Mojo's Box is Ready!', Order ID: bbox-397207c2, Done button

browse_drawer_secondary_button.evidence: 'Birthday Box →' button opens BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer slide-in panel from right

browse_drawer_5_tabs.evidence: 5 tabs verified: Cakes, Toys & Joy, Style, Memory, Wellness - all clickable

browse_drawer_miras_pick_row.evidence: Mira's pick row shown at top of each tab (Cakes: Salmon Birthday Cake, others verified)

browse_drawer_allergy_banner.evidence: Allergy banner shows 'Filtered for Mojo: no soy, chicken' on each tab. However only wellness tab products are actually filtered - see design_issues

browse_drawer_bottom_bar_build_btn.evidence: Bottom bar shows 'Build Mojo's Box' button with gradient background

post_build_endpoint.evidence: POST /api/birthday-box/pet-mojo-7327ad56/build returns allergy_confirmation_required when allergyConfirmed=False; returns success=True with orderId when allergyConfirmed=True. All verified via backend tests.
